allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "import planit_spike; from planit_spike import cli, runner, fetch, report, portal_detect, paths, throttle, config, types; print\('import OK, version', planit_spike.__version__\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from planit_spike.runner import run; import inspect; print\('run params:', list\(inspect.signature\(run\).parameters\)\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest tests/test_portal_detect.py tests/test_paths.py tests/test_fetch.py -v)

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "import planit_spike; from planit_spike.portal_detect import derive_urls; from planit_spike import config; print\('import OK'\); print\('FETCH_KINDS:', config.FETCH_KINDS\); print\('derive sample keys:', list\(derive_urls\({'url':'https://x/applicationDetails.do?keyVal=K'}\)\)\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -m planit_spike.cli --input sample_jobs.json --output-dir output-extension --insecure-hosts pa.midkent.gov.uk)
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from planit_spike.report import build_daily_report, write_daily_report; print\('report imports OK \(no cycle\)'\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from planit_spike.planit_client import fetch_created_raw, fetch_created, _fetch_feed_raw; print\('planit_client imports OK'\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from planit_spike.daily import run_daily, _write_planit_json, _build_planit_client; print\('daily imports OK'\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -m planit_spike.cli run --date 2026-07-10 --output-dir output-live-drybatch1 --limit 3 --insecure-hosts pa.midkent.gov.uk --verbose)
